---
title: "Reconstruction Attacks"
format: html
---

<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=notebook.html">
<script>
window.location.replace("notebook.html");
</script>

This compatibility page now redirects to the notebook-first RevealJS deck:

- [Open the reconstruction lecture deck](notebook.html)
- Editable source: `lectures/02-reconstruction/notebook.ipynb`
